mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, order_no AS orderNo, create_time AS createTime, pay_time AS payTime, status, total_price AS totalPrice, address, receiver, phone, logistics_company AS logisticsCompany, tracking_no AS trackingNo, logistics_status AS logisticsStatus FROM shop_order ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, order_no AS orderNo, create_time AS createTime, pay_time AS payTime, status, total_price AS totalPrice, address, receiver, phone, logistics_company AS logisticsCompany, tracking_no AS trackingNo, logistics_status AS logisticsStatus FROM shop_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, order_no AS orderNo, create_time AS createTime, pay_time AS payTime, status, total_price AS totalPrice, address, receiver, phone, logistics_company AS logisticsCompany, tracking_no AS trackingNo, logistics_status AS logisticsStatus FROM shop_order WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shop_order (user_id, order_no, create_time, pay_time, status, total_price, address, receiver, phone, logistics_company, tracking_no, logistics_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{orderNo}, #{createTime}, #{payTime}, #{status}, #{totalPrice}, #{address}, #{receiver}, #{phone}, #{logisticsCompany}, #{trackingNo}, #{logisticsStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE shop_order SET pay_time = #{payTime}, status = #{status}, logistics_company = #{logisticsCompany}, tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, logistics_status = #{logisticsStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shop_order WHERE order_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
